programme.title: The Late Shift
programme.desc: When the undisputed "King of Late Night" announced his retirement, the stage is set to find a replacement host of the successful "The Tonight Show".

programme.title: Shazam!
programme.desc: A kid has the ability to turn into Shazam, an adult superhero. But he needs to master his powers quickly to fight the deadly forces of evil.

programme.title: Joker
programme.desc: Arthur Fleck, aka the Joker, arch-nemesis of Batman, goes on his journey from societal outcast and failed comedian to cackling criminal mastermind.

programme.title: 锦衣卫
programme.desc: 明朝时，英宗昏庸无能，大权落入刘永饰的宦官之手，他利用锦衣卫诛杀异己；然梁家仁饰的锦衣卫统领却义释忠良。其父在宦官胁迫下被迫追杀亲子...

programme.title: 裸血
programme.desc: 凌波的丈夫高远及其友王侠，均与肚皮舞女郎孟莉有染，孟藉此勒索二人；后孟被杀，高成嫌疑犯，另孟之兄翟诺，亦向高勒索；而凌在家，也接见了谷峰，他声言有为高洗罪的证据，但要索钱；王妻李香君借贷给凌... 究竟谁是杀孟真凶？

programme.title: 野姑娘
programme.desc: 金小芳是一位活泼且无畏的乡村少女，面对恶霸从不退缩，总是勇敢反抗。当她揭露了唐家大少爷的阴谋后，立刻引来他的狠毒报复。幸好，她心仪的男子大海及时挺身而出相救。两人能否携手对抗险恶命运，改写结局？

programme.title: 天下第一拳
programme.desc: 故事描述，顾文宗饰的老拳师突遭百武馆馆徒袭击，幸汪萍饰的女儿及罗烈饰的弟子救驾；顾自知年迈力衰，不足为罗师，亦恐邪派夺全国锦标，遂面谕罗改投尚武馆习艺，以夺魁为期许。罗途遇王金凤饰的卖唱女遭调戏，王获救后欲以身相许，罗心中有汪遂拒王；后罗屡遭百武馆徒滋扰，更为外援日本浪人所伤...

programme.title: 愤怒青年
programme.desc: 沈昌生性沉郁，与父亲缺乏沟通，被人利用，误入歧途。昌逃不过暴力的魔爪和色情的引诱，竟然出卖父亲，让父亲惨死。昌悲悔交加，独闯飞仔巢，逐一将之击毙，自已也进入疯狂状态。

programme.title: 埋伏
programme.desc: 捕快万超凡与父亲遭人诬陷，背负抢劫珠宝的罪名，沦为逃亡的通缉犯。身陷绝境，万超凡誓要寻回失落的珠宝，洗脱万家的冤屈。然而，他并非唯一寻宝之人......

programme.title: 青春鼓王
programme.desc: 船员孙志强巧合成为「火花大乐队」的鼓手，他因急于成名，答应帮助音乐杂志出版人李源明接近乐队经理黄丽真，以换取源明的力捧。终于，志强得偿所愿，一炮而红，源明却逼他实践诺言，与丽真断绝来往。志强受到极大打击，唯有忍痛离开乐队与丽真...

programme.title: 大旗英雄传
programme.desc: 铁中棠乃大旗门掌门云翼之义子，因门派宝藏之秘密而遭宿敌司徒笑追杀。为解开身世与宝藏之谜，他远赴长春岛寻访「日后」，却发现她早已离世。岂料在岛上意外遇见大旗门真正的创派掌门「夜帝」，而夜帝亦亲口揭露，自己正是铁中棠的生父。

programme.title: 阿牛出狱记
programme.desc: 续集中阿牛不幸的遭遇更令人心痛，当中不少更是笑中有泪的经历。阿牛出狱后，再遇爱人阿花，可惜她已嫁为人妻；另一方面，戆直的阿牛仍不断被狡猾的周大叔欺骗...

programme.title: 四骑士
programme.desc: 韩战结束之后的汉城，出现了近代四骑士。他们包括拳术教官金义、搏击教练冯侠、爆破专家高英寒及枪械专家李维诗。四人于兵燹之中幸存，不约而同以寻欢作乐作为生活方式。以霍克、雷泰、银花为首的贩毒组织，欲收买退役美国军曹偷运毒品回国，军曹最后不欲冒险，被霍克手下爪牙杀死。冯侠被嫁祸成杀人嫌疑犯，金义、高英寒、李维诗为救朋友，同心协力与罪恶组织展开多场生死搏斗...

programme.title: 七仙女
programme.desc: 故事描述少年董永卖身传员外家，为奴以埋父骨；其孝心感动了七仙女，便幻成村姑，在六位仙姐下凡暗助下，为董缩减偿还工作日，回复自由后，二人回董故家，但愉快的凡间生活能持续多久呢？

programme.title: 天涯明月刀
programme.desc: 电影讲述傅红雪为了应付势力庞大的阴谋家公子羽，除了力敌对方的爪牙，亦要智破对方的诡计。凭藉出色的武打设计、华丽的布景、唯美的拍摄技巧及强劲的演员阵容，《天涯明月刀》在武侠电影的历史上创下高锋。

programme.title: 相思河畔
programme.desc: 富商之子冯琪伟恋上歌女方碧玉，碧玉身世凄凉，常受流氓头子林老二及李老三压榨勒索，幸得琪伟相助并娶之为妻。婚后二人育一子，惜李老三再度敲诈，最终琪伟为爱妻讨回公道而与李老三同归于尽...

programme.title: Lake Ball Pit / The Poppy Corn Festival
programme.desc: Cannonball! Archibald becomes a lifeguard at Lake Ball Pit. When Loy can't get along with a rival, Archibald gets a lesson in the art of sarcasm.

programme.title: The Case Of The Stuck Toys
programme.desc: When Noddy arrives at Toy Green Station, he finds some toys stuck to the ground: someone has spread some glue all over the station platform! Why would someone do that? Noddy investigates.

programme.title: The Case Of The Untidy Pirates
programme.desc: It's Tidy Toyland Day and Noddy wants to win the Tidy Toyland Trophy. Unfortunately he's also invited the untidy Pirates round to play! Noddy has to figure out how he can play with the Pirates and win the Tidy Toyland Trophy.

programme.title: The Case Of The Ruined Race
programme.desc: It's the Brickabuild Sports & Fun Day and Clockwork Mouse tells Carlton she doesn't want ANY accidents. But when the Egg & Spoon Race comes to a grinding halt, Noddy has to find out who is trying to ruin the race.

programme.title: The Case Of The Missing Investigation Kit
programme.desc: It's the Royal Egg Hunt and Noddy's investigation kit goes missing. With Bumpy and Revs, Noddy soon finds some of his things, but not his binoculars. Someone must be using them, but what for? Noddy needs to find out in time before the Egg Hunt starts.

programme.title: Why Hippo Has No Hair
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Hippo did have hair… lots of hair! She was always harumphingly hot. Then one hot night while Hippo was sleeping a spark from the fire caught the end of her hairy tail! Hippo was on fire! She ran through the bush until SPLOSH! Hippo jumped in the waterhole. And from that day on Hippo stayed in the cool waters without a single hair on her hide. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Why Tortoise Has A Broken Shell
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Tortoise's shell was all shiny and smooth. One day Tortoise discovered the birds were having a Feast in the Heavens and he tricked the Birds into making him a pair of wings. Greedy Tortoise raced the birds beyond the clouds and scoffed the whole feastt! When the Birds found out Tortoise had to jump off a cloud until BOOF!!! He landed on his shiny shell.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Eco Igloo
programme.desc: Mrs Goggins is spearheading a recycling initiative "A Greener Greendale" but has been overwhelmed by donations of plastic bottles and compost. Meanwhile, Pat picks up today's special delivery - blocks of ice to make an igloo at the school for their North Pole project. Pat and Ajay struggle to get the slippery blocks into PAT2, then Pat and Jess must endure a journey with the air-con on full blast to keep the blocks frozen. Despite this, the ice starts to melt on the way to the Schoolhouse.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Reckless Rollers
programme.desc: Pat is delivering some new car wash rollers to Ted, but the locks on his van doors are faulty. As Pat negotiates an obstruction in the road, the van doors fly open and the rollers fly into a field of startled sheep! Integrating them into their flock, the sheep make off with them, and Pat and Jess take chase, creating more chaos on the roads. Meanwhile, PC Selby has arrived at the car wash, eager to get the panda car cleaned for his date with Dr Gilbertson.

programme.title: Car Boot Sale
programme.desc: Big Chris has a clear out and takes all his old junk up to Farmer Green's car boot sale but misses the clutter in Rusty. How will he get everything back?

programme.title: Hot Stuff
programme.desc: Big Chris takes the cars to the beach to relax in the heat but he is so busy dealing with the cars he forgets to drink his water. But hang on, who else has drunk it…

programme.title: Law And Order
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor is fed up with the cars running amok on his track and summons Bill and Nick to restore order to the track. But might our overzealous policeman overstep the mark?

programme.title: Flash's Tea Party
programme.desc: Flash invites everyone to a tea party, thinking they bring the food with them. Are there going to be a lot of hungry bunnies at Silver hatch?

programme.title: The Case Of The Torn-Out Pages
programme.desc: Someone's ripped out the final pages of Queen Sparklewings Fairytale book! Who could it be ? Noddy needs to find out fast and restore the pages to the book or the Queen's special fairytale storytelling will be cancelled.

programme.title: The Case Of The Bird That Can't Fly
programme.desc: Noddy finds a bird in Pat-Pat's Treehouse that doesn't seem to be able to fly. He decides to investigate: how can they help the bird to fly? Noddy finds out that the bird can fly - it just doesn't want to. But why ?

programme.title: The Case Of The Clockwork Mouse Mystery
programme.desc: Everyone in Toyland is excited about the first ever Winter Light Festival - except its organiser, Clockwork Mouse who is moving at super fast speed. Noddy investigates why she's acting so strangely. He works out that she's been trying to move at triple speed to get everything sorted in time. Noddy helps her realise that she doesn't have to do all the festival preparations on her own. Well done Noddy!

programme.title: The Case Of The Missing Smartysaurus
programme.desc: For the Night of the Stars, Noddy invites all his friends at home to look at the stars through his telescope. Smartysaurus will bring a map of the stars so everyone can spot them. But when the party starts, Smartysaurus hasn't arrived. Noddy investigates and finds out his big friend couldn't fit through his small front door so she'd shrunk herself! Noddy has to help Smartysaurus get back to her proper size and find a way for everyone to enjoy the Night of the Stars together. Good job, Noddy.

programme.title: Dollhouse Detectives
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives, using all their senses to find clues, follow them, and solve the mystery. For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: Mission to CATurn
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around. In the Cat-osphere, they take a twirl through Space Swirls and zip through the Supergallactic Doughnut Hole and even meet DJ Catnip's cousin, DJ Comet! For the Cat of the Day Segment, Baby Box and DJ Comet show us how to craft a papier-mâché Caturn.

programme.title: Grumblegard, Part 1
programme.desc: While the others care for baby dragons at the roost, Dak, Winger, Burple and Aggro come face-to-face with a grumpy old dragon on a dangerous island.

programme.title: Grumblegard, Part 2
programme.desc: The Rescue Riders plan to team up with the Slinkwings when an angry Grumblegard threatens Huttsgalor. But their old enemies may be up to new tricks.

programme.title: It Takes a Zenko / What a Racket
programme.desc: When various townsfolk report having lost soft belongings, TZG secretly investigates to discover thieving pigeon Yolanda had been building a nest for baby gophers. / When Ian’s lucky badminton racket goes missing, TZG secretly finds and returns it in time for a rematch against his toughest opponent.

programme.title: Hammy in the House / To Go Lunch
programme.desc: When Eden finds an "injured" Hammy out of his cage and helps him recuperate in her own home, she finds it harder and harder to get her "new guest" to return to his own home. / When Marcus forgets his lunch at home, Phoebe and the Dews must find a way to deliver him his lunch during his class's field trip to the park, but when they lose his lunch they must work to create a new and nutritious alternative.

programme.title: The Case Of The Torn-Out Pages
programme.desc: Someone's ripped out the final pages of Queen Sparklewings Fairytale book! Who could it be ? Noddy needs to find out fast and restore the pages to the book or the Queen's special fairytale storytelling will be cancelled.

programme.title: The Case Of The Bird That Can't Fly

programme.title: The Case Of The Missing Smartysaurus

But when the party starts, Smartysaurus hasn't arrived. Noddy investigates and finds out his big friend couldn't fit through his small front door so she'd shrunk herself! Noddy has to help Smartysaurus get back to her proper size and find a way for everyone to enjoy the Night of the Stars together. Good job, Noddy.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Strange Strife of the Smelly Socktopus
programme.desc: After Erica convinces them that being suspended is a great vacation, George and Harold pull off every prank they can think of in order to get suspended

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Jarring Jerkiness of the Judge J.O.R.T.S
programme.desc: George and Harold transform their new Spanish teacher into a superhero after they feel guilty for pranking him, but their teacher loves it and gets carried away

programme.title: Captain Underpants and The Vexing Villainy of the Vile Vimpire
programme.desc: When Erica makes fun of George and Harold’s latest and greatest comic, they make a comic about her becoming a vampire

programme.title: Captain Underpants and The Horrible Hostilities of the Homework Hydra
programme.desc: When George and Harold go back in time to stop the invention of homework, they realize they also eliminated the most important thing in the world: comic books

programme.title: Captain Underpants and The Frenzied Farts of Flabby Flabulous
programme.desc: George and Harold create a comic book about their gym teacher, but after a freak accident turns fantasy into reality, the best friends must run from his revenge

programme.title: Doodlebook
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Desert
programme.desc: Under orders from D-Structs, Scrappit steals one of Garby's parts, leading the Dinotrux on a trek through the desert to find help for their friend.

programme.title: Grandpa's Treasures
programme.desc: In the wake of her grandfather's death, Lucky sets out to show the town his softer side and give him the goodbye he deserves.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Troublesome Treachery of the Thieving Toot Fairy
programme.desc: George and Harold race against Mr. Krupp to try to get him fired before they get expelled

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Tenuous Takedown of the Tyrannical Teachertrons
programme.desc: In the season opener, George and Harold have returned to school due to a technicality, but the school has been taken over by Melvin and a cyborg Melvin from the future! Their goal is to make the school extremely difficult by replacing all the teachers with Teachertron robots. Suffering under the new regime and without Mr. Krupp/Captain Underpants on hand to help, the boys hypnotize gym teacher Mr. Meaner and turn him into Sergeant Boxers to fight back.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Frantic Fury of the Fearsome Furculees
programme.desc: Tired of the Melvins ruling the school, the boys realize that they need Mr. Krupp to make the school at least bearable. Unfortunately, Krupp has run off to Ecuador to look for a fabled fountain. So the boys form the M.I.S.F.A.R.T.S. - Mega Incredible Search Force Adventure Rescue Team Squad - to travel to Ecuador and bring Krupp back, whether he wants it or not.

programme.title: One Last Job
programme.desc: The team plans a heist in order to obtain the enchanted pendant that can lead them to the storm wheels. Elsewhere, Klaus and Veruca shipwreck on a mysterious island that is actually home to the mages, and also the Tianshang weapon helmet.

programme.title: Doom and Groom
programme.desc: Po and the team have one last attempt to get the pendant, but they will have to disrupt Jayesh's wedding, and contend with his guards, to do so. At the mage island, Klaus and Veruca get hold of the Tianshang helmet.

programme.title: The Pinging
programme.desc: Mr. Ping is possessed by the ghost of Master Mastodon, the ancient master sworn to protect the Tianshang storm wheels. After a ghostly sewer chase, Mastodon agrees to help our team to stop Klaus and Veruca. He reveals that their next step is to go across the sea to Central America.

programme.title: Dollhouse Fairy Tales
programme.desc: The Gabby Cats put their own spin on the classic fairytales "Rapunzel," "The Princess and the Pea," and "Little Red Riding Hood." For the Cat of the Day Segment, CatRat sings a song!

programme.title: Happy CAT-O-Ween
programme.desc: It’s Cat-O-Ween in the dollhouse, and all the Gabby Cats are in the holiday spirit. Gabby and Pandy dress up and go trick-or-treating around the dollhouse, where they make cat-o-lanterns with Baby Box, search for hidden treats with MerCat, and make Banana ghosts with Cakey. Along the way, CatRat plays silly tricks on them, but in the end Floyd manages to trick them all! For the Cat of the Day segment, all the Gabby Cats sing a special Cat-O-Ween song.

programme.title: A Cat-Tabulous Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Par Avion
programme.desc: When Mega Fat tries to get Boss Baby fired while on an airplane to Pairs, Tim and Staci must prevent a baby meltdown

programme.title: Cat Cop!
programme.desc: When baby families are leaving town, Boss Baby and Tim battle to prove Bootsy is behind it all

programme.title: Hang in There, Baby
programme.desc: When Mega Fat CEO Baby claims he has dirt that could get Boss Baby fired, Boss Baby and the team try to find a way to get it first!

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Troublesome Treachery of the Thieving Toot Fairy
programme.desc: George and Harold race against Mr. Krupp to try to get him fired before they get expelled

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Tenuous Takedown of the Tyrannical Teachertrons
programme.desc: In the season opener, George and Harold have returned to school due to a technicality, but the school has been taken over by Melvin and a cyborg Melvin from the future! Their goal is to make the school extremely difficult by replacing all the teachers with Teachertron robots. Suffering under the new regime and without Mr. Krupp/Captain Underpants on hand to help, the boys hypnotize gym teacher Mr. Meaner and turn him into Sergeant Boxers to fight back.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Frantic Fury of the Fearsome Furculees
programme.desc: Tired of the Melvins ruling the school, the boys realize that they need Mr. Krupp to make the school at least bearable. Unfortunately, Krupp has run off to Ecuador to look for a fabled fountain. So the boys form the M.I.S.F.A.R.T.S. - Mega Incredible Search Force Adventure Rescue Team Squad - to travel to Ecuador and bring Krupp back, whether he wants it or not.

programme.title: The Final Key
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere tells the kids that the failed mission is over, but Tony isn’t ready to give up, and he’s determined to rescue Frostee. The crew goes rogue by deciding to steal the final key from Shashi and trade it for their friend.

programme.title: Ignition
programme.desc: Shashi finally reveals his master plan.

programme.title: The Key To The Strip
programme.desc: The kids battle Shashi in Las Vegas as Shashi tries to take down evil billionaire Cleve and use Skeleton Key to create a new world order. Frostee has a plan to get Skeleton Key offline, but it only gives Tony ten seconds to take Shashi out and save the world.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Strange Strife of the Smelly Socktopus
programme.desc: After Erica convinces them that being suspended is a great vacation, George and Harold pull off every prank they can think of in order to get suspended

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Jarring Jerkiness of the Judge J.O.R.T.S
programme.desc: George and Harold transform their new Spanish teacher into a superhero after they feel guilty for pranking him, but their teacher loves it and gets carried away

programme.title: Captain Underpants and The Vexing Villainy of the Vile Vimpire
programme.desc: When Erica makes fun of George and Harold’s latest and greatest comic, they make a comic about her becoming a vampire

programme.title: Captain Underpants and The Horrible Hostilities of the Homework Hydra
programme.desc: When George and Harold go back in time to stop the invention of homework, they realize they also eliminated the most important thing in the world: comic books

programme.title: Captain Underpants and The Frenzied Farts of Flabby Flabulous
programme.desc: George and Harold create a comic book about their gym teacher, but after a freak accident turns fantasy into reality, the best friends must run from his revenge

programme.title: A Fistful of Herbs
programme.desc: When Po discovers he was poisoned, he sets off to a caravan oasis in the hopes of finding out who the perpetrator is, unknowingly followed by the kid

programme.title: Bad Omen
programme.desc: When Omen hijacks the Mothership and Royal Cores, all seems lost for our heroes. The Royal heirs are able to defeat the killer Blank, but at a high cost.

programme.title: Moving Day
programme.desc: After last season’s victory, Aja and Krel struggle to relocate Mothership back to their Arcadia Oaks neighborhood, but their task is complicated when Toby and Eli discover the Royals’ Akiridion secret.

programme.title: 前进战略高地
programme.desc: 以全球华人战略观点与思维製作的大国政治、经济与军武版图角力的深度解析节目；锁定全球最新的第一线军事动态、强权政治博弈与国际经济衝击，拆解大国角力背後的战略思维。

programme.title: 前进战略高地
programme.desc: 以全球华人战略观点与思维製作的大国政治、经济与军武版图角力的深度解析节目；锁定全球最新的第一线军事动态、强权政治博弈与国际经济衝击，拆解大国角力背後的战略思维。

programme.title: cti talk网路论坛
programme.desc: 中天2024全新网路论坛《两岸永久和平 大师对话系列》，我们邀请最顶尖大师，探讨两岸永久和平的可能性，更剖析年轻人心中的集体焦虑。2024总统大选前所有人都该关心的题目，新政府，候选人，年轻世代，三方脑力激荡，欢迎一起来讨论，在未来恐更多变的两岸关系里，碰撞出一个更好的新未来。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】启澄履任主席当日，已打算辞退一妍，一妍以放假为由暂时度过危机。一妍与AKL银行新任总裁戴德桥见面，提出惊人的合作建议。国际刑警指，坠机事件很可能不是意外。明塱集团爆出丑闻，股价大跌，同时遭到AKL银行催逼还款。启澄被迫将持有的股份「以股抵债」，AKL银行不费吹灰之力就成了大股东之一。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 朝堂上，七海伶面对彧修明的质问，阐述了刺杀他的理由。彧修明解释了与夜北的冲突，并赦免了七海伶的刺杀之罪，要求其带着族人迁徙到越州。同时，任命界诸婴为越州司马。另一方面，叶凌霜因被误认为与七海伶同谋而被判斩首，但在最后时刻被彧修明救下，要求她找到真师。七海伶和叶凌霜在宫中做最后的告别，随后七海伶和界诸婴一同前往越州。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 微雨燕双飞
programme.desc: 荆国安平初年少年皇帝即位，战事纷涌，民不聊生。六品官员白文泰的侄女茉喜（张楠饰）与掌上明珠凤瑶（王玉雯饰）意外被卷进了是非之中。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】明塱医院心胸外科顾问医生董一妍，完成了难度极高的手术，为医院奠定国际地位。此时，集团主席王进涛正身在欧洲古堡，为迎娶一妍作准备。进涛的长子王启智、二子王启聪均是继任主席的人选，两人都认为一妍是他们的威胁。启智的妻子陈丽雪是明塱慈善基金会主席，启聪的妻子文以珈则是正义律师。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍将王家私人飞机坠毁的消息压下；王家三女王启澄与其丈夫彭建邦，暗通进涛的死敌柯永成，要令明塱医院停摆。以珈与丽雪质问下，一妍终讲出所知；一妍答应让两人到当地参与搜救，她则留港善后，但一切要保密……一妍安排专机让坠机生还者进涛回港就医，越洋吩咐副院长林英杰紧急安排，同时暗中跟记者交易……

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】以珈、丽雪等仍在丧亲的哀伤中，一妍已经要收起伤悲，面对正向明塱集团猛扑过来的一场狙击风暴！一妍私自拉拢高官莫康尧换取明塱医疗城投标顺利，也尝试拉拢副院长英杰。进涛的四女王启心收到消息，赶到医院，确定进涛已经脑死亡，决定拔喉，却遭一妍阻止！结果事情闹大，消息外泄！

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】追思会上，永成突然现身，宣告他已得到其他股东支持，将召开特别董事会重选成员与集团主席。一妍要阻止永成进董事会，就要有足够股权送自己入局，于是想拉拢以珈、丽雪。一妍看准丽雪对启智的感情以作游说，惟握有最多股权的以珈，坚决表明不参与。进涛亡妻的姐姐万秀琳成一妍最后可拉拢之人，她亲往澳门拜访秀琳，秀琳却突然心脏病发。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】启澄履任主席当日，已打算辞退一妍，一妍以放假为由暂时度过危机。一妍与AKL银行新任总裁戴德桥见面，提出惊人的合作建议。国际刑警指，坠机事件很可能不是意外。明塱集团爆出丑闻，股价大跌，同时遭到AKL银行催逼还款。启澄被迫将持有的股份「以股抵债」，AKL银行不费吹灰之力就成了大股东之一。

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十二集 女人呀 周慕孙精心铺垫，他给罗曼约了投资人，很自然一起吃饭。饭后，又见卖荷花的人，也想起上次电影看一半。周慕孙顺理成章带罗曼回家，借着电影坦诚自己从小颠沛流离，床上有人就睡不好，句句吐露余情未了，忽然陈凯西打来电话。罗曼恨铁不成钢吵起来，也没心思再跟周慕孙腻歪。周慕孙安抚她别再掺和别人夫妻家务事，说着给她戴上一条项链。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十三集 嘿，女人 离婚协议赫然显现，陈勉笑问，陈凯西又是唱哪出？陈凯西回他。想给自己赎身？陈勉轰的一声懂了，钟倾城跟他约饭聊天是为了套行踪定位，那天在景山笑着跟他说电影台词，原来是把他当猎物耍？陈凯西要他的股份和跳跳的抚养权，现在签字，否则，罗曼就会用周慕孙的手机，把陈勉和张凡的股权转发到朋友圈，上市将化为泡影。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十四集 我们同时是仇敌和亲爱的 周慕孙，坐在罗曼对面，两人小酌，把复盘敲钟夜。周慕孙保持优雅，省略被骗后踢翻乐高，无能狂怒，他念着那晚罗曼的乖巧，觉着两人本质相同。罗曼说出心里话，他们都是欲望的动物，但周慕孙毫无底线，伤痕累累的他无力去爱只剩下空壳。周慕孙反问，方驰不也一样？罗曼冷冷丢下一句，你这样好难看。潇洒转身。

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.desc: Speleologists discover the body of a woman staged in a strange manner, surrounded by snakes. Two days later, a second victim is found in the same circumstances. An investigation in which Inspector Lionel Orphus must work alongside his first love, eleonore Vallance.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】启澄履任主席当日，已打算辞退一妍，一妍以放假为由暂时度过危机。一妍与AKL银行新任总裁戴德桥见面，提出惊人的合作建议。国际刑警指，坠机事件很可能不是意外。明塱集团爆出丑闻，股价大跌，同时遭到AKL银行催逼还款。启澄被迫将持有的股份「以股抵债」，AKL银行不费吹灰之力就成了大股东之一。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 朝堂上，七海伶面对彧修明的质问，阐述了刺杀他的理由。彧修明解释了与夜北的冲突，并赦免了七海伶的刺杀之罪，要求其带着族人迁徙到越州。同时，任命界诸婴为越州司马。另一方面，叶凌霜因被误认为与七海伶同谋而被判斩首，但在最后时刻被彧修明救下，要求她找到真师。七海伶和叶凌霜在宫中做最后的告别，随后七海伶和界诸婴一同前往越州。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 微雨燕双飞
programme.desc: 荆国安平初年少年皇帝即位，战事纷涌，民不聊生。六品官员白文泰的侄女茉喜（张楠饰）与掌上明珠凤瑶（王玉雯饰）意外被卷进了是非之中。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】明塱医院心胸外科顾问医生董一妍，完成了难度极高的手术，为医院奠定国际地位。此时，集团主席王进涛正身在欧洲古堡，为迎娶一妍作准备。进涛的长子王启智、二子王启聪均是继任主席的人选，两人都认为一妍是他们的威胁。启智的妻子陈丽雪是明塱慈善基金会主席，启聪的妻子文以珈则是正义律师。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍将王家私人飞机坠毁的消息压下；王家三女王启澄与其丈夫彭建邦，暗通进涛的死敌柯永成，要令明塱医院停摆。以珈与丽雪质问下，一妍终讲出所知；一妍答应让两人到当地参与搜救，她则留港善后，但一切要保密……一妍安排专机让坠机生还者进涛回港就医，越洋吩咐副院长林英杰紧急安排，同时暗中跟记者交易……

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】以珈、丽雪等仍在丧亲的哀伤中，一妍已经要收起伤悲，面对正向明塱集团猛扑过来的一场狙击风暴！一妍私自拉拢高官莫康尧换取明塱医疗城投标顺利，也尝试拉拢副院长英杰。进涛的四女王启心收到消息，赶到医院，确定进涛已经脑死亡，决定拔喉，却遭一妍阻止！结果事情闹大，消息外泄！

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】追思会上，永成突然现身，宣告他已得到其他股东支持，将召开特别董事会重选成员与集团主席。一妍要阻止永成进董事会，就要有足够股权送自己入局，于是想拉拢以珈、丽雪。一妍看准丽雪对启智的感情以作游说，惟握有最多股权的以珈，坚决表明不参与。进涛亡妻的姐姐万秀琳成一妍最后可拉拢之人，她亲往澳门拜访秀琳，秀琳却突然心脏病发。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】启澄履任主席当日，已打算辞退一妍，一妍以放假为由暂时度过危机。一妍与AKL银行新任总裁戴德桥见面，提出惊人的合作建议。国际刑警指，坠机事件很可能不是意外。明塱集团爆出丑闻，股价大跌，同时遭到AKL银行催逼还款。启澄被迫将持有的股份「以股抵债」，AKL银行不费吹灰之力就成了大股东之一。

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十二集 女人呀 周慕孙精心铺垫，他给罗曼约了投资人，很自然一起吃饭。饭后，又见卖荷花的人，也想起上次电影看一半。周慕孙顺理成章带罗曼回家，借着电影坦诚自己从小颠沛流离，床上有人就睡不好，句句吐露余情未了，忽然陈凯西打来电话。罗曼恨铁不成钢吵起来，也没心思再跟周慕孙腻歪。周慕孙安抚她别再掺和别人夫妻家务事，说着给她戴上一条项链。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十三集 嘿，女人 离婚协议赫然显现，陈勉笑问，陈凯西又是唱哪出？陈凯西回他。想给自己赎身？陈勉轰的一声懂了，钟倾城跟他约饭聊天是为了套行踪定位，那天在景山笑着跟他说电影台词，原来是把他当猎物耍？陈凯西要他的股份和跳跳的抚养权，现在签字，否则，罗曼就会用周慕孙的手机，把陈勉和张凡的股权转发到朋友圈，上市将化为泡影。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十四集 我们同时是仇敌和亲爱的 周慕孙，坐在罗曼对面，两人小酌，把复盘敲钟夜。周慕孙保持优雅，省略被骗后踢翻乐高，无能狂怒，他念着那晚罗曼的乖巧，觉着两人本质相同。罗曼说出心里话，他们都是欲望的动物，但周慕孙毫无底线，伤痕累累的他无力去爱只剩下空壳。周慕孙反问，方驰不也一样？罗曼冷冷丢下一句，你这样好难看。潇洒转身。

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: 荣誉:她们的法庭
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】三位律师挚友在专为女性受害者辩护的律所中，面对20年前秘密重现。她们展现钢铁般的团结，直面过去阴影，守护正义与彼此。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7 (S2)
programme.desc: An opportunistic group of young Xudum lionesses surprises the crew with newborn cubs.

programme.title: Bigness
programme.desc: Griff Rhys Jones starts his Canadian journey in Newfoundland where he goes looking for moose.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather (S5)
programme.desc: In Germany, floods tear through central European towns and villages. In Nepal a landslide threatens local communities. In California, wildfires tear through the states forests and farms.

programme.title: Oman - Al Hajar Mountains
programme.desc: Join Ryan as he explores the most dramatic sections of the Western Al Hajar mountain range which runs west of the Capital Muscat reaching heights of over 3,000 meters, 9,842 feet.

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7 (S2)
programme.desc: An opportunistic group of young Xudum lionesses surprises the crew with newborn cubs.

programme.title: Earth's Biggest Festival: Kumbh Mela (S1)
programme.desc: The story of the Kumbh Mela, the festival estimated to gather 400 million people over 45 days. As Hindus make the pilgrimage to bathe at the riverbank, tragedy strikes on the holiest day of the event.

programme.title: Drug Runner Lover

programme.desc: The search for a missing priest leads detectives on a multi-state manhunt for a suspect who may be the only person with the answers to his whereabouts.

programme.desc: Shocking first-hand accounts of people who were manipulated, abused, and finally broke free before it was too late. We'll hear from former members of Gwen Shamblin's Remnant Fellowship, and more.

programme.desc: A man hangs on the hood of his car while his ex-girlfriend drives it on the highway. An intoxicated woman flees from airport police on a motorised suitcase; and more.

A woman who killed her husband is disowned by her children in court; a teacher who slept with her teenaged students apologises to the victims' families; and more.

programme.title: 我想和你唱5
programme.desc: 《我想和你唱》第五季震撼回归！本季节目将继续升维星素共唱新玩法，通过搭档形式，让广大民众展现才华，演绎出多元的音乐风格。让我们一同感受大众力量的扩音，沉浸式体验音乐最本真的愉悦，让记忆中的美妙旋律闪耀发光吧!

programme.title: 詹姆士出走料理
programme.desc: 为了寻找记忆中的美味料理，詹姆士将带领大家探索市场，品尝在地美味、寻访料理达人。并在节目中展现特殊食材的处理方式、尝试新的酱料或是新的料理作法，制作创意料理，最后在节目片尾时作出一道『詹姆士创意料理』。

programme.title: 山海夏味
programme.desc: 《山海夏味》通过市井美食和鲜味文化，探访街头小店的烹饪智慧与地域精神。节目打破精致摆盘套路，用生动镜头展现活鱼、热锅等原始食材冲击力，聚焦坚守在烟火中的普通人，呈现一方水土的饮食江湖与生活哲学。

In 2025, Gomez made the switch to Brighton and the Premier League. Now on the South Coast, Gomez is establishing himself as an important part of the Seagulls' team.

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 试真D
programme.desc: 主持江美仪畅游深圳、珠海、惠州、东莞、潮州、汕头等广东省不同地方，每站联同周嘉洛、朱敏瀚、曾展望、吴业坤当中两位男拍档，以顾客的身分测试多款美食可会有「伏」，探索各式玩乐景点值得光顾与否，为香港观众提供贴地的参考指数。

programme.title: 春闺梦里人
programme.desc: 季曼失忆后阴差阳错成宁钰轩夫人，凭智慧与经商逆转命运，并助夫君平乱获皇帝封赏。二人联手铲除恶势力与阴谋，历经坠崖分离与重逢，最终共度风雨终成眷属。

programme.title: 流行都市
programme.desc: 《流行都市》为观众介绍时令产品、健康养生、健体运动、护肤化妆、时尚服饰、婴幼儿护理、育儿知识、城中美食、饲养宠物等潮流资讯，内容包罗万有！

programme.title: 快乐长门人
programme.desc: 节目请来专业医生及中医，详细探讨长者要注意的疾病及都市病，提供预防及治疗的方法。营养师讲解饮食知识，从饮食中学习养生之道。

programme.title: 美食新闻报道
programme.desc: 香港汇聚环球美食，特色佳肴、贴地料理受到识饮识食之人的密切关注！黄婉曼、蔡雪莹、倪嘉雯、黄嘉雯、廖慧仪、伍倩彤等美食主播、主持，紧贴最新饮食情报与优惠，深入了解滋味背后的故事。

programme.title: 香港早晨
programme.desc: 报道香港、两岸及国际重要新闻。

programme.title: 美女厨房
programme.desc: 萧正楠、Bob和张振朗主持第三度开放的《美女厨房》。一众女艺人听完菜名及流程简介，便要动手煮出指定菜式，在烹调时更要保持神秘感，让男嘉宾猜猜她们是谁。

programme.title: 港生活．港享受
programme.desc: 香港人生活多姿多采，《港生活．港享受》既呈献高贵典雅的品味生活，也会带来贴地亲民的优质享受。节目结合多元化主题，每集探索不同范畴，并请来各行各业的精英分享成功之道。

programme.title: Hands Up
programme.desc: 儿童节目《Hands Up》鼓励小朋友勇于发问，表达自我，向目标进发！吉祥物「酱汁家族」成员跟一众主持演出短剧，陪伴大家度过愉快时光。另会带来多首儿歌，让孩子们边唱边学习生活知识。

programme.title: 迷网
programme.desc: 高级督察司徒忠隶属网络安全及科技罪案调查科。他与刚毕业的见习督察萧美婷一起联手破获各种网络诈骗案的同时，不知不觉中互生好感。

programme.title: 还原神之食
programme.desc: 文学作品中的虚构菜式，大家可有推想过是甚么味道？主持请来星级厨师，从电视剧集、电玩游戏、卡通动画、文学名著中寻找创意灵感，发掘内里提到的一些特色美食，并透过名厨的巧手，将这些看似不真实的菜式「还原」。

programme.title: 大梦想家
programme.desc: 主持谭凯萤游走台湾各地，深入市区黄金地段、新市镇发展潜力区域，探寻气派不凡的豪宅别墅与特色家居，细看《大梦想家》！移居台湾的港人，如何实现置业与创业梦想？多位「梦想家」分享当地的买楼故事与生活指南。

programme.title: 周六聊Teen谷
programme.desc: 踏入科技年代，青少年对新兴电子产品、网络流行媒体尤感兴趣，追上时代步伐，已成新世代指标！主持陈星妤、陈懿德、王菲用尽所能搜罗世界各地至潮、至新情报，上至世界盛事、医学百科、文艺与科技；下至日常生活、网络热搜，跟观众一一分享。

programme.title: 中年好声音4
programme.desc: 《中年好声音4》为35岁以上热爱歌唱的人士提供舞台，鼓励他们勇敢追梦。本季扩大全球招募，覆盖粤港澳大湾区、北美、新加坡、马来西亚、澳洲等地，吸引更多来自不同背景的中年参赛者以歌声讲述自己的故事。

programme.title: 一周星星
programme.desc: 访谈节目《一周星星》，每集邀请星级艺人、界别名人，与区永权、许文轩、王镇泉等娱乐主播，分享新近工作企划，谈论电影、电视、演唱会相关的特别话题，尤其是网民与圈中朋友关心热议的人和事！

programme.title: 还原神之食
programme.desc: 文学作品中的虚构菜式，大家可有推想过是甚么味道？主持请来星级厨师，从电视剧集、电玩游戏、卡通动画、文学名著中寻找创意灵感，发掘内里提到的一些特色美食，并透过名厨的巧手，将这些看似不真实的菜式「还原」。

programme.title: 教煮争霸
programme.desc: 当「鼎爷」李家鼎、「三姐」萧秀香刚柔相遇，意味着一场全新的厨房大战蓄势待发！每集由嘉宾为鼎爷与三姐出题，当中包括著名厨师、识食艺人等，务求让两人以相同食材或主题，烹调出各具风格的菜式，比试同时分享煮食心得。

programme.title: 新闻透视
programme.desc: 《新闻透视》，每周专题报道多段香港以至国际的瞩目新闻，聚焦港人最关心的民生话题，并邀请各界人士、学者、专家，一同深入探讨个中来龙去脉。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 退休有乜计
programme.desc: 《退休有乜计》探讨香港人如何为安稳、有意义的退休生活做好准备。节目通过真实个案、专家访谈和理财建议，分析退休究竟需要多少积蓄，强积金及其他储蓄工具的角色，并讨论六十岁后兼职工作究竟是无奈之举还是个人选择。

programme.title: 唱钱
programme.desc: 挑战音域的极限、拍子的精准，全新互动音乐游戏节目《唱钱》由森美、Eric Kwok、李茵彤任主持，以专业音准分析系统考验参赛者。九宫格代表九个难度等级，参赛者每当连成一线「过三关」，可选择提款离场、继续挑战，甚至是最难的Monster关卡。

programme.title: J Music
programme.desc: 《J Music》致力打造高质音乐平台，一众歌手有展示音乐实力的机会之余，也可让乐迷更深入了解歌手的音乐故事。节目邀请「人气」歌手担任嘉宾，由嘉宾亲自挑选其喜欢的新旧作品，并即场演唱，分享喜爱曲目。

programme.title: 晚间新闻
programme.desc: 每晚报道香港、两岸、国际重要新闻以及体育消息，让你洞悉各地大事及体坛动向。

programme.title: 周六聊Teen谷
programme.desc: 踏入科技年代，青少年对新兴电子产品、网络流行媒体尤感兴趣，追上时代步伐，已成新世代指标！主持陈星妤、陈懿德、王菲用尽所能搜罗世界各地至潮、至新情报，上至世界盛事、医学百科、文艺与科技；下至日常生活、网络热搜，跟观众一一分享。

programme.title: 新闻掏宝
programme.desc: 《新闻掏宝》带大家在宝库「掏」新闻宝藏，除了昔日特辑、直播和系列报道，还有从未曝光的珍贵片段，观众有机会重温李小龙出殡、宝生银行劫案、四人帮审讯、英女王访港、的士罢驶、中英签订联合声明、戴卓尔夫人专访等。

programme.title: 综艺大热门
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: 我想和你唱5
programme.desc: 《我想和你唱》第五季震撼回归！本季节目将继续升维星素共唱新玩法，通过搭档形式，让广大民众展现才华，演绎出多元的音乐风格。让我们一同感受大众力量的扩音，沉浸式体验音乐最本真的愉悦，让记忆中的美妙旋律闪耀发光吧!

programme.title: 詹姆士出走料理
programme.desc: 为了寻找记忆中的美味料理，詹姆士将带领大家探索市场，品尝在地美味、寻访料理达人。并在节目中展现特殊食材的处理方式、尝试新的酱料或是新的料理作法，制作创意料理，最后在节目片尾时作出一道『詹姆士创意料理』。

programme.title: 山海夏味
programme.desc: 《山海夏味》通过市井美食和鲜味文化，探访街头小店的烹饪智慧与地域精神。节目打破精致摆盘套路，用生动镜头展现活鱼、热锅等原始食材冲击力，聚焦坚守在烟火中的普通人，呈现一方水土的饮食江湖与生活哲学。

programme.title: 非诚勿扰
programme.desc: 非诚勿扰是一档适应现代生活节奏的大型婚恋交友节目, 在广大单身男女提供了一个公开的婚恋交友平台的同时, 也迎来了新的当红男星作为新一任的非诚合伙人。

programme.title: 综艺玩很大
programme.desc: 综艺天王吴宗宪与超人气主持KID林柏昇联手合作，艺人分成两队挑战各式关卡，节目充满趣味性，更借外景地点的不同，带领观众深入了解各地风土民情。

programme.title: 全城风暴
programme.desc: 科研人员张子聪与团队共同研发的"风控"系统，暗藏的隐患导致了自然灾害的发生。一场始料未及的台风、雷电、地震等自然灾害的连锁反应，让这座城市瞬间崩塌。父亲张英勇拼死一搏也要守护儿子张子聪和女儿张子然。这场猝不及防的台风让一切尽于灰烬，但爱得以重生。

programme.title: 你好，星期六
programme.desc: 节目通过新奇多样的环节设置和兼具知识性、趣味性的创意内容，深度展现明星艺能。

programme.title: 亲爱的客栈2026
programme.desc: 节目以"慢下来，趣生活"为核心，经营一家有趣、好玩、有温度的年轻客栈。在经营与体验中，解锁未知惊喜，邂逅温暖故事，共赴一场关于陪伴、治愈与热爱的"趣生活"之旅。

programme.title: 灼灼风流

programme.desc: 讲述了心存凌云之志、一心考取功名的女官慕灼华（景甜饰）与沙场沐血折戟、誓为同袍雪冤的战神刘衍（冯绍峰饰）彼此救赎、相知相爱，携手守家卫国的故事。

programme.title: 灼灼风流
programme.desc: 讲述了心存凌云之志、一心考取功名的女官慕灼华（景甜饰）与沙场沐血折戟、誓为同袍雪冤的战神刘衍（冯绍峰饰）彼此救赎、相知相爱，携手守家卫国的故事。

programme.title: 天才冲冲冲
programme.desc: 「寓教于乐」的大型综艺节目, 节目单元不仅推陈出新, 在生活中更能与三五好友, 一同尝试节目中的各项游戏, 亲身体验节目中的各项乐趣。

programme.title: 亲爱的客栈2026
programme.desc: 节目以"慢下来，趣生活"为核心，经营一家有趣、好玩、有温度的年轻客栈。在经营与体验中，解锁未知惊喜，邂逅温暖故事，共赴一场关于陪伴、治愈与热爱的"趣生活"之旅。

programme.title: 声生不息·华流季
programme.desc: 以"华流国际化"为核心，《声生不息·华流季》以音乐对抗与融合为引，推动华语音乐走向世界。从金曲回忆到文化共鸣，跨越三代的声音在舞台上汇聚，用旋律唤醒集体记忆，谱写属于华语乐坛的自信新章。

programme.title: 山海夏味
programme.desc: 《山海夏味》通过市井美食和鲜味文化，探访街头小店的烹饪智慧与地域精神。节目打破精致摆盘套路，用生动镜头展现活鱼、热锅等原始食材冲击力，聚焦坚守在烟火中的普通人，呈现一方水土的饮食江湖与生活哲学。

programme.title: 去湘当有味的地方
programme.desc: 汪涵作为大哥带领沈梦辰、吴泽林网罗全省美食，借此展现14个市州丰富多元的湘菜味道，透过美食背后的故事，展现湖南各地独特的乡情烟火气。

programme.title: 夜限照相馆
programme.desc: 剧情讲述只为逝者存在的鬼客专门照相馆的刻薄摄影师徐奇周（周元饰）和热血的律师韩春（权娜拉饰）与阴森森的夜客们来往于生死之间惊险又奇妙的故事。

programme.title: ANZAC Painter

programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: Ghosts of Saigon
programme.desc: As the Vietnam War neared its chaotic end, thousands of children were evacuated. Some arrived in Australia through Operation Babylift. This documentary traces the emotional journey of those adopted into Australian families.

programme.title: One Day Revolution
programme.desc: It was the original cricket revolution, and the game hasn't been the same since. The '80s saw the rise of the one-day format, capturing a new generation of fans and turning the gentleman's game into a new national obsession.

programme.desc: Fiji is ground zero in the Pacific's drug crisis. Huge quantities of methamphetamine and cocaine are being trafficked through Fiji and on to Australia, fuelling a wave of addiction and corruption in the Fijian community.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Gym / The Crew Puts On A Construction Show
programme.desc: Coach Karima asks Rubble & Crew to build a gym for the gymnastics show. But when the beam is too high for Lily, it's up to the pups to save the day.//When a traveling show can't get to Builder Cove, Rubble & Crew decides to build a show of their own!

programme.title: The Crew Builds Charger A Super Bed / The Crew Builds A Super Squirrely Whirly Playground
programme.desc: Charger has a problem... he's got too much energy to sleep! Lucky for him, Rubble & Crew knows there's always a construction solution. // Rubble and the pups build Mix, Motor, Lucas, and Lily the coolest Super Squirrely Whirly playdate ever!

programme.title: Isa's Royal Garden Party / Sammy's Surprise
programme.desc: The Queen of Reptiles is visiting Isa, but the garden's a mess! Dora helps her get everything ready in time for La Reina's visit. / Dora meets Sammy the Sloth, who needs to get to Day Camp on time so he can show everyone a special surprise.

programme.title: The Floor Is Guava / We Are The Grumples
programme.desc: Boots wants to enjoy Banana Fest, but the Guava Geyser is erupting! Dora needs to stop the geyser and save the festival. / It's Picture Day, but the Grumpy Old Troll runs away! Dora follows him into Troll World to get him to come out for the picture.

programme.title: The Perfect Dinner / The Kittens
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama go out to celebrate their birthdays. Barbabelle is in charge and gets overwhelmed. // Barbabelle watches Bali's kittens. She's scared something will happen and won't let them out. Barbamama must intervene to help the kittens.

programme.title: The Treasure Hunt / Going into the Wild
programme.desc: Mr. Strict's twins visit the barbababies. The barbababies organize a treasure hunt for the twins and enjoy the great outdoors. // The Barbapapas are off to a new adventure... in the garden. But living in nature is more complicated than they expected.

programme.title: The Fuchsia Ocean / Zero Waste
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: Hiccupism / Silence please
programme.desc: Barbabeau can't paint. He has a hiccup he can't get rid of. Just when he's about to give up, he accidentally creates a new artistic movement. // Barbalib wants to compete in a writing contest but his brothers and sisters stop her from concentrating.

programme.title: Where Did It Go Barbabravo? / The Big Bad Hen
programme.desc: Like a secret agent, Barbabravo leads the investigation equipped with his gadgets to find out who stole Barbapapa's cake. // Barbalala is convinced she heard a giant hen prowling around the house. The Barbababies organize themselves to stand guard.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Smoothie Shop / The Crew Builds A Dino Roof Party
programme.desc: Cafe Carl opens up a smoothie shop on the boardwalk! But when the coaster causes coconut chaos, Rubble & Crew know just what to do. // Rubble & Crew work together to find a construction solution when Charger's bouncy birthday surprise needs a lift!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Ferris Wheel / The Crew Builds A Farm Animal Yoga Space
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to give Grocer Gabriel the best beach day ever... including a ride on a brand new Ferris wheel at the boardwalk! // When Farmer Zoe's animals need some relaxation, the pups build a perfect place to practice yoga with Coach Karima.

programme.title: Pups Save a Hoedown / Pups Save Alex
programme.desc: It's Adventure Bay Western Days, when a herd of cows escape from a train at the railway station! // When their friend Alex decides he wants to be a member of the PAW Patrol the PUPS and Ryder let him come along for the ride.

programme.title: Pups Save a School Day / Pups Turn on the Lights
programme.desc: Alex loses his back pack on the first day of school! Ryder and the Paw Patrol need to help him find it. // It's Chase's birthday and the pups are planning a surprise party. A storm causes the power to go out!

programme.title: The Puppet / Gloop Gloop Ah-Ah
programme.desc: The Barbababies decide to create a show and go all out! // Barbotine wants to create the best lemonade.

programme.title: Living Together / Holey The Snowman
programme.desc: For the very first time, the Barbababies will take the train and sleep in a hotel. // Barbouille crafted a magnificent snowman that the children named Bobo.

programme.title: Happy Parky
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever.

programme.title: Storm
programme.desc: When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.title: Super Dad
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar.

programme.title: The Crew Builds a Fountain Show / The Crew Builds A Carousel
programme.desc: When Sierra Sparkle's big concert stage needs some extra sparkle, Rubble & Crew use a construction complication to make a big splash. // Rubble & Crew decide to go big when Grocer Gabriel wants something special built outside of his grocery store.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Parking Garage / The Crew Builds A Campsite
programme.desc: The Crew helps with a parking problem when Cafe Carl's ice cream machine brings lots of cars to Builder Cove. // When Rubble's fear of the dark derails the pup's Bark Yard campout, the Crew comes up with an idea to help him enjoy the starry night.

programme.title: Mascota Mobile / Kite Festival
programme.desc: Dora is about to give her pets a bath when the pet-washing truck goes haywire, and she has to save pets throughout the rainforest! // Dora and Boots save a mouse in time for him to show off his giant kite at the Rainforest Kite Festival.

programme.title: The Midnight Mile
programme.desc: It may be nighttime in Axle City, but all the trucks are staying up super late for the ultimate all-night race: the Midnight Mile! And the first truck to cross the finish line will win the Glow-in-the-Dark trophy!

programme.title: Safety Croc / Good Sport Croc
programme.desc: When Daisy skins her knee learning to skateboard, Mr. Crocodile tries to keep her from ever getting another booboo. // Good sports Mr. Crocodile and Daisy face off in a game of soccer with bad sport Winston.

programme.title: Double Dare You / Roy
programme.desc: On a ski trip, the Barbapapas build a giant igloo. Barbabravo and Barbalib challenge each other to find out who is braver. // Barbabright creates a vacuuming robot that's also very good at soccer. The Barbababies organise a match against the robots.

programme.title: The Grass is Always Greener... / When I Grow Up
programme.desc: Barbabright coats the house in magic product to prevent water leakage. The next day, The house deflates like a balloon. // A bird builds its nest on Barbazoo's belly. Barbazoo wants to become a big tree to shelter animals. This becomes complicated.

programme.title: Roadtrip / Tickets / Talent Show
programme.desc: The Rex family go on a road trip through the galaxy to get to Rocket World // Tim & Kai compete to get Terri's spare Space-Land ticket // Tim, Tia & Tommy decide to put on a talent show, but then they can't decide who should go first...

programme.title: Sparkle's Big Rescue
programme.desc: When Crusher sends Blaze away with one of his latest cheats, Blaze's little sister Sparkle comes to save the day and bring her brother back in time so they can race together to win the Teamwork Trophy!

programme.title: Mail Truck Blaze
programme.desc: When three big mail deliveries are needed around the world, there's only one monster machine who can deliver it all: Mail Truck Blaze! He'll swim across seas, climb mountains, and venture to the Monster Dome --because mail trucks ALWAYS deliver!

programme.title: The Crew & Marshall Build A Fire Station
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build Builder Cove's first ever Fire Station, complete with an inspection from Paw Patrol's Marshall! But when Speed Meister's sneaky sabotage traps Marshall's Fire Truck, the pups work together to put out a fire construction-style.

programme.title: The Crew Does A Home Renovation / The Crew Builds A Lighthouse
programme.desc: The pups are starstruck when their favorite TV renovation star, Hank Hammer, comes to see them at work. // Cap'n Turbot is bringing Mayor Greatway a big surprise. But when a thick fog rolls in, the pups have to build a lighthouse fast!

programme.title: Pups save Thundermouth / Pups Save a Class Pet
programme.desc: Shortly after listening to the story of Thundermouth, the pups are on a mission to save elephants spooked by a scary noise. // Mayor Goodway is left in charge of a class pet, but the hamster escapes! Now it's up to the Paw Patrol to save the pet.

programme.title: Pups Save a Runaway Rooster / Pups Save a Snowbound Cow
programme.desc: Chickaletta and Roosterio run away from a chicken show and get stuck on top of a runaway drone. // When Bettina wanders up Jake's mountain and gets caught in a snowstorm, it's up to the Paw Patrol to bring her safely down.

programme.desc: Abuela shows Dora her photo album of birds, with one page blank: the Quickatoo. Dora vows to find the Quickatoo and get a picture to complete the album. // Dora and Boots help a baby parrot named Lorito find his Mami, but he can't stop copying Boots!

programme.desc: Dora and Boots take Claudia, an energetic young rain cloud, to rain on a dry water slide.

programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar.

programme.title: Time Out
programme.desc: Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas.

programme.title: Cookies

programme.title: The Queen
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit is to be given the Queen's Award for Industry, and Peppa and her friends are to accompany her to the palace to meet the Queen!

programme.title: Perfume
programme.desc: After smelling Granny Pig's perfume de lavender, Peppa experiments with the flowers in the garden to create her own special smell.

programme.title: The Children's Fete
programme.desc: The school roof is leaky again, so the children organize a fair to raise money for a new roof.

programme.title: The Pet Competition
programme.desc: Playgroup is having a pet competition and everyone has brought their pets. Dr Hamster is the judge, but it is so hard to choose the best pet...

programme.title: Spider's Web
programme.desc: Ew! There's a spider in the house! Mummy Pig tells Daddy Pig to get rid of it.

programme.title: The Noisy Night
programme.desc: Peppa's family is staying at Cousin Chloe's house. It's been a long day and everyone is sleepy. But baby Alexander keeps everyone awake with his crying!

programme.title: The Wishing Well
programme.desc: Granny Pig is really pleased with all the plastic gnomes and the wishing well she's got for the garden, but Grandpa Pig wishes they would all disappear!

programme.title: Madame Gazelle's Leaving Party
programme.desc: The children are sad because their favorite teacher, Madame Gazelle, is leaving daycare. But a leaving party will give her a good send-off.

programme.title: Barba TV / The Museum
programme.desc: The barbababies are glued to the TV. Since they love it so much, their parents encourage them to make their own shows. // The Barbapapa visit the museum of evolution. On the program: creation of the Earth, Precambrian submarine and... dinosaurs!

programme.title: Barbazoo Can't Say ''No'' / The Doppelganger
programme.desc: Barbazoo is ready to help. But Barbabright and Barbabelle abuse his kindness and drive him crazy. // By chance, Barbazoo realizes he can imitate Barbapapa. He uses this opportunity to distribute chores to his brothers and sisters. Will they find out?

programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile dresses as Super Crocodile for his first Halloween, and tries to live up to his new identity. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile promise to take care of Mrs. Flores' prized plant, but keep putting it off for "later".

programme.title: The Jungle Horn
programme.desc: Stripes loves his jungle horn, a special instrument that can summon all the animals in the jungle. But when a jealous Crusher steals it, Blaze and Stripes must speed after him in a wild chase to get it back.

programme.title: Truckball Team-Up
programme.desc: Blaze discovers an exciting new sport called Truckball. But when Crusher and his team of cronies challenge him, Blaze must scour all of Axle City to put together a Truckball team before the big game.

programme.title: Rocky's Cat-astrophe
programme.desc: Rocky bites off more than he can chew when he invites a kitten to stay at the Lookout overnight. As the irascible kitten who idolizes Rocky causes more trouble than expected.

programme.title: Rocky's Cat-astrophe
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger transforms his robot cat Meow-Meow into a tiger-sized metal-eating menace, the Paw Patrol calls in the Cat Pack to help stop the creature.

programme.title: Rocky's Cat-astrophe
programme.desc: Cat-Pack members Wild and Shade team up with the Mighty Pups to stop a runaway rocket. // When the Ruff-Ruff Pack swipes a priceless golden lion mask from the museum, Shade and Wild must help the Paw Patrol to retrieve the stolen artifact

programme.title: Rocky's Cat-astrophe
programme.desc: Leo and Rory join the Paw Patrol on a visit to the jungle, and end up helping to rescue an injured baby monkey. // When Mayor Humdinger rebuilds Meow Meow to break into Mayor Goodway's new safe, the Cat Pack joins the Paw Patrol to save the day.

programme.desc: Madame Gazelle must go to the dentist so leaves the class with Mr Bull. The children already know the subjects Mr Bull suggests teaching, so he decides to show them how to fix a squeaky floorboard.

programme.desc: Mummy Pig is baking an apple pie, so Daddy Pig suggests Peppa and George play a game of looking for things. Peppa and George have fun running around the house solving the clues.

programme.title: Poems
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle introduces the children to poetry, explaining how sounds can be poems too. Together they make a poem about rain and perform it to the parents.

programme.title: Please and Thank You

programme.title: Ice Cream
programme.desc: Mr Labrador has an ice cream van but runs out of ice cream. Granny Pig suggests Peppa and George make their own ice cream with the help of Mr Labrador.

programme.title: Science Museum
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends go on a school trip to visit a science museum. There are lots of fun activities including bubbly water, static balloons and Grampy Rabbit's rocket ship.

programme.title: Officer Blaze

programme.desc: Barbazoo is ready to help. But Barbabright and Barbabelle abuse his kindness and drive him crazy. // By chance, Barbazoo realizes he can imitate Barbapapa. He uses this opportunity to distribute chores to his brothers and sisters. Will they find out?

programme.title: 少年陈真之乱世英雄
programme.desc: 电影讲述清末上海的小人物陈真，在经历苦难及面对无数挑战后，蜕变成长为民族英雄的故事。

programme.title: 无敌幸运星
programme.desc: 富翁死前立下遗嘱，把财富全留给女儿飞飞，逼使其子秋少及侄儿大傻设法分一杯羹。大傻派小混混幸运星往偷遗嘱，欲在遗嘱上做手脚，而秋少亦找来貌似其妹的阿凤假扮飞飞骗取遗嘱。幸运星打算骗"假飞飞"结婚以夺取遗产，不料二人日久生情，最终幸运星在婚礼日揭发二人的诡计。

programme.title: 龙虎武师
programme.desc: 香港动作电影向来以龙虎武师的真功夫蜚声国际。这部纪录片向过去所有的龙虎武师致敬，并用上超过两年时间梳理了海量的影像资料，更采访了无数动作特技演员分享拍摄时的辛酸事迹，当中包括著名武打巨星成龙、甄子丹及洪金宝。

programme.title: 精武风云 - 陈真
programme.desc: 1920年代的上海，陈真以年轻实业家身份潜伏，欲揭露黑社会头目与日军的勾结。他不仅要取得头目的信任，还需应对日军将领麾下杀手的重重狙杀。为隐匿行迹，他戴起黑色面具，联手警局队长，以威猛铁拳守护这座城市的爱国志士。

programme.title: 僵尸家族
programme.desc: 一群盗墓的考古学家意外发现一个保存完好的僵尸家族，计画将他们贩卖至黑市牟利。岂料在运送途中，不慎撕下封印僵尸的纸符，让沉睡的亡灵苏醒逃窜。然而，当地中医师林正英挺身而出，誓要将它们彻底剿灭。

programme.title: 反收数特遣队
programme.desc: 在金融危机期间，绝大多数香港市民陷入债务困境。此时，贵利集团采取无情手段逼迫债务人还款，李探员与其地下部队誓言缉拿这个非法组织的头目。

programme.title: 缘份
programme.desc: 一个刚毕业的年青人在地铁站内邂逅一个美丽动人的女子，并对她一见钟情。在另一方面，他正被一个富家女展开追求。而此时他倾心的那女子，也正周旋于一个已婚男子之中。当那年青人向她表白时，那女子要求与他在地铁站内玩捉迷藏来决定大家的缘份！

programme.title: 一代宗师
programme.desc: 这部史诗式动作电影是由著名电影人王家卫执导。故事始于佛山，当时年迈的北方功夫宗师宫羽田公开挑战南方宗师叶问。叶问最终胜出，但后来输给宫羽田的女儿宫二，二人却因此结下情缘...

programme.title: 混世四猴：神猴归来
programme.desc: 世人心目中的救世主灵明石猴，曾给一位绝望中的小女孩一个从没兑现的希望，让她一直深深牵挂。直至多年后，灵明石猴在与三眼战神激战后，被打破金身堕入凡尘，因而丧失神力。灵明石猴能否补偿当年小女孩的承诺？又可会破坏木神祸乱人间的阴谋？

programme.title: 再见七日情
programme.desc: 护卫员阿逊被派往保护富商的儿子，期间巧遇住在隔壁的祖儿，更渐渐爱上她，却发现原来祖儿是富商的情妇。当他俩的恋情被富商发现后，事情一发不可收拾！

programme.title: 大内密探零零发
programme.desc: 零零发是宫廷四大高手之一，专职保卫皇帝的安全。虽然不谙武功，却有着不寻常的嗜好：打造超越时代的发明。皇上被掳后，他靠着自己的过人发明救驾。

programme.title: 逃学威龙三之龙过鸡年
programme.desc: 富商王百万被发现离奇死于酒店房间，由于周星星与他极为相似，星星再次接受任务，作卧底调查这宗谋杀案。王百万生前与妻子感情早已破裂，妻子因此成为头号嫌疑人。然而，在调查过程中，星星发现王百万的友人林大岳同样形迹可疑......

programme.title: 表错七日情
programme.desc: 一对年轻夫妇因欠税款被法庭下令封屋，限七日缴付欠税，并以房屋和财产作为抵偿。丈夫因移情别恋不知去向，法庭则雇用一个年轻的护卫员来看管少妇。那护卫员竟然与少妇日久生情...

programme.title: Classmates
programme.desc: Friends from across the world get together for a class reunion. On the night of the reunion, one of them is almost murdered and goes into a coma. Release Year: 2006 Director: Lal Jose Awards: Kerala State Film Awards - Best Film with Popular Appeal and Aesthetic Value, Best Story, Kerala Film Critics AwardsBest Popular Film, Asianet Film Awards - Best Film

programme.title: Varsham
programme.desc: Venkat and Shailaja fall in love on a train, but her father disapproves. He plans to marry her off to Bhadranna, a ruthless landlord obsessed with her. Release Year: 2014 Director: Ranjith Sankar

programme.title: Aanum Pennum
programme.desc: An anthology film journeys through Kerala's history, presenting three distinct eras and three intertwined stories that reveal culture, change, and resilience across time. Release Year: 2021 Director: Venu,Aashiq Abu,Jay K.

programme.title: Orange
programme.desc: Yakobi, who works in a farm, marries Sarita without the knowledge of his family. Will this secret affect his future? Release Year: 2012 Director: Biju Varkey

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26 (Data Zone)
programme.desc: Following their 2-1 win at St James’ Park in September, Arsenal are looking to complete the league double over Newcastle for the first time since 2020-21.

programme.title: 一步一脚印 发现新台湾
programme.desc: 台湾到处有充满创意、认真工作的人们，「一步一脚印，发现新台湾」将呈现出真实而全面的新台湾精神。

programme.title: 国民大会
programme.desc: 「国民大会」从台湾的人、台湾的事，畅谈台湾的故事，以深入浅出，轻松幽默的不同面向解读社会时事的氛围。

programme.title: 拜托ATM
programme.desc: 极具未来感场景的全新益智综艺节目《拜托ATM》，结合电玩游戏概念，挑战者将透过益智竞争，开启ATM进行终极译码游戏。一场科技与智慧的益智竞赛《拜托ATM》由行长胡瓜、襄理Sandra与精英挑战者携手打造。

programme.title: FOCUS全球新闻
programme.desc: 聚焦全球大事，从华府到北京，从欧美到亚非，从政治、经济到科技与文化，透过深度而完整的报导，带领观众进入关键事件的核心，补给面向世界的知识能量，掌握国际发展趋势。

programme.title: 地球黄金线
programme.desc: 「地球黄金线」首创专业汽车实境秀，提共最实用的市售车评比、最深入的汽车经典赏析、最夯的车坛趋势，解析汽车科新风貌。

programme.title: 食尚玩家 2天1夜 go
programme.desc: 绝对精彩的美食节目。看后保证让您垂涎三尺！

programme.title: 健康2.0
programme.desc: 您对自己的身体了解多少？怎么样吃才能吃出健康和美丽？网络上的健康秘方到底是真是假？主持人郑凯云、江坤俊医师与韦汝将为您的健康把关！

programme.title: 11点热吵店
programme.desc: 《11点热吵店》透过年轻世代的角度，无论是两性、职场、人际、时事娱乐等，大谈他们最关心、最想发泄、最有意见的热门话题！

programme.title: 女人我最大
programme.desc: 《女人我最大》节目内容包罗万象，从各行各业的奇特文化；社会异象到生活新鲜事，美艳的主持人蓝心湄将带领观众一起探讨及解开谜团。

programme.title: 整点新闻

programme.desc: 史上最饿劣的食竞节目! 节目首创以"饥饿"为实境主轴, 想要摆脱'饿'名, 就必须无'饿'不作, 让饥饿指数归零, 成为最后赢家!

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。
